metadata.description: Personal Marketplace for development with claude code

plugins.name: beads-tasks
plugins.description: Beads task tracking with tasker, reviewer, and verifier agents — use with planning mode for full orchestration

plugins.name: project-docs
plugins.description: Project documentation lifecycle: create, update, improve, and review project docs

plugins.name: project-ops
plugins.description: Operational skills for a project: run the full test suite, cut a release, and analyze monitoring data — driven by installed topic skills and the canonical docs taxonomy

plugins.name: complexity-review
plugins.description: Skeptical complexity review for requirements, architecture, and code — bias toward simplicity

plugins.name: github-releases
plugins.description: Language-agnostic GitHub release workflow with quality gates, semver, and release notes

plugins.name: claude-catppuccin
plugins.description: Visual style for Claude Code: Catppuccin Mocha color theme

plugins.name: keep-awake-linux
plugins.description: Prevents Linux system sleep while Claude Code is actively working — releases automatically when idle or on session exit
